title: Neon Mycelium: Dream Noir
intro_cutscene: Jazz seeps through the cracks and neon spores rain from the cavern ceiling. Each droplet paints ripples of color across the stone.
MORCHELLA (VO): In the city’s underbelly, you don’t chase the light. You chase what’s left behind.
A shadowy figure glides through the mist—her hat wide, veil of spores trailing—a legend lost in midnight blue.
A hush falls. Lady Amanita’s song is silent. The city stirs, unease blooming.
A whisper in the mycelium pulls me in: 'A dream’s gone missing. Without it, even neon fades.'
I slip past the velvet curtain. Fungal jazz swells. Beneath the music, the city’s secrets tremble.
Tutorial overlay: Tap to the beat—grow your first clue from the pulsing mycelium. Every rhythm, a memory rising from the dark.

before_lines: Blue haze and velvet shadows. The Spore & Velvet club smells of lost nights and memories on the brink.
MORCHELLA: Every corner hides a secret—or a staff member who thinks they’re a secret.
after_lines: Beneath smudged bar-glass, a shivering spore-glow. My first fragment: a sliver of forgotten song.
MORCHELLA: These aren’t thefts. They’re siphons. The city’s dreams are bleeding out.

before_lines: Lichen Market thrums under neon nets. Vendors hawk memories, not wares.
LADY AMANITA: Even the mushrooms barter for dreams here. Keep your thoughts close, detective.
after_lines: An Echo Cap pulsing in my palm—proof dreams are traded citywide.
MORCHELLA: Someone’s stealing refrains, not just verses. The whole city’s going silent.

before_lines: Jazz reverberates through the alleys—syncopation stitched by sporelight. The festival should be euphoric, but fear lingers beneath the melody.
SPORELOCK: Music bends the truth, if you let it. What will you let go, Morchella?
after_lines: From behind a shifting mask, Obscura’s voice slides between trumpet notes.
OBSCURA: What is memory but a song you keep playing for yourself?
MORCHELLA: Maybe. But I don’t dance to someone else’s tune.

before_lines: Below the city’s roots, time warps in mycelium coils—dreams leak, reality loses its grip.
LADY AMANITA: Even if my last dream fades, I’ll use it to light your way.
after_lines: Her melody glimmers and breaks—a sacrifice echoing through the deepest spores.
MORCHELLA: Some dreams burn out so others can bloom.

before_lines: Ancient stone opens—a stage of memory. The city’s heart pulses, fragile, silent.
SPORELOCK: The last clue is always the hardest to let grow, child.
after_lines: I hold my forgotten dream—its rhythm aches. All around, the city waits—dim, breathless.
OBSCURA: Release yourself. Join us in the soft hush of oblivion.
MORCHELLA: No more silence. Play it loud—let every spore remember.

boosters.name: Luminescent Chord
boosters.effect: Clears a cross-shaped area centered on a chosen tile and charges jazz meter.

boosters.name: Veil Ripper
boosters.effect: Destroys all Obscura Veils and may reveal Evidence Mushrooms.

boosters.name: Synesthesia Blossom
boosters.effect: Transforms one color family into Jazz Note Spores.

boosters.name: Jazzman's Inspiration
boosters.effect: Fills jazz meter and makes abilities free for three turns.

levels.name: Neon Prelude
levels.content: Board: 6x6 grid. Only Glow Spore tiles (blue, pink, green, gold). No obstacles. Simple matches (min. 3) tutorialized. No rare tiles, no abilities enabled.
goals: Collect 20 clue_energy by matching Glow Spores
levels.narrative_beat: Morchella enters the Spore & Velvet club, learning to sense the neon mycelium for the first time.

levels.name: First Whispers
levels.content: Board: 6x6 grid. Glow Spore tiles only. Introduce Mycelium Strand tile (1 per board, acts as wild). First use of Pulse Reveal ability enabled after 1 combo.
goals: Collect 30 clue_energy using at least one Pulse Reveal
levels.narrative_beat: Detective learns to pulse the grid, uncovering a faint clue amidst the club's haze.

levels.name: Jazz Sync
levels.content: Board: 6x6 grid. Glow Spores, Mycelium Strand (2 per board). Jazz Note Spore introduced (spawns after 2 consecutive on-beat matches). Rhythm Sync tutorial. Jazz_meter now visible.
goals: Fill the jazz_meter to 50% by making rhythm-synced matches
levels.narrative_beat: Morchella tunes into the club's jazz rhythm, learning to match clues in time with the beat.

levels.name: Shadow Traces
levels.content: Board: 7x7 grid. Glow Spores, Mycelium Strand (2 per board). Dream Shadow obstacle appears (2 tiles, requires adjacent matches to clear). Syncopate ability unlocked for first use.
goals: Clear all Dream Shadows and collect 35 clue_energy
levels.narrative_beat: The first obstacles appear as Morchella finds shadowy residue at the scene.

levels.name: Fragment Echo
levels.content: Board: 7x7 grid. Glow Spores, Mycelium Strand (2 per board). Dream Shadow (3 tiles). First Evidence Mushroom (spawns after 4+ chain or via Spore Grow, which is unlocked for this level).
goals: Collect 1 Dream Fragment by matching Evidence Mushroom
levels.narrative_beat: Morchella finds a fragment of Lady Amanita’s dream—proof the memories are being siphoned.

levels.name: Groove in the Gloom
levels.content: Board: 8x8 grid. Glow Spores, Mycelium Strand (3 per board). Dream Shadows (4 tiles). Jazz Note Spores spawn from 3+ rhythm-synced matches. Spore Grow and Syncopate abilities enabled.
levels.narrative_beat: Investigating deeper, Morchella’s intuition sharpens as the club’s jazz intensifies and clues become more elusive.

levels.name: Market Undercurrents
levels.content: Board: 8x8 grid. Glow Spores, Mycelium Strand (4 per board), Dream Shadows (5 tiles). Evidence Mushrooms appear after every 4+ match chain. Jazz Note Spores spawn more often. All abilities available.
levels.narrative_beat: Morchella follows a trail to the Lichen Market, piecing together clues from encrypted merchant spores.

levels.name: Syncopated Riddles
levels.content: Board: 8x8 grid. Glow Spores, Mycelium Strand (4 per board), Dream Shadows (6 tiles). Higher frequency of Jazz Note Spores. Evidence Mushrooms require 5+ match chains or Spore Grow. All abilities and boosters unlocked up to Chapter 2.
levels.narrative_beat: A sabotage attempt during a jazz set: Morchella must groove to the rhythm and outsmart the shadows.

levels.name: Obscura’s Veil (Mini-Boss)
levels.content: Board: 9x9 grid. Glow Spores, Mycelium Strand (5 per board), Dream Shadows (7 tiles), first Obscura Veil obstacle (2 tiles, only removable by Syncopate or Jazz Note Spore explosion). Evidence Mushrooms from 6+ chains. Veil Ripper booster is now available.
levels.narrative_beat: A masked Obscura operative taunts Morchella as veils descend, testing both rhythm and intuition.

levels.name: Blue Midnight Lament
levels.content: Board: 9x9 grid. Glow Spores, Mycelium Strand (5 per board), Dream Shadows (6 tiles), Obscura Veil (2 tiles), Jazz Note Spores frequent, Evidence Mushrooms spawn via Spore Grow or 5+ match chains. All abilities and Veil Ripper booster available.
levels.narrative_beat: Morchella and Lady Amanita regroup at the club’s midnight set, piecing together the city-wide conspiracy under the neon glow.

ending: City lights bloom, one spore-lamp at a time—a symphony rebuilt from memory.
Lady Amanita’s melody haunts the alleys, vivid as the day she first sang.
SPORELOCK: Only a fool thinks a city is ever truly saved. But tonight, we remember.
MORCHELLA: Every dream costs something. But in Neon Mycelium, the rhythm goes on.
